items.title: Recycled Rimu Benchtops – Sustainable NZ Timber with History – Innate Furniture
items.description: Rimu (Dacrydium cupressinum) is one of Aotearoa’s treasured native timbers, prized for its strength and beauty. In the past, rimu was so popular for building and furniture that it was over-harvested, leading to severe reductions in its availability. Today, cutting down a native rimu is heavily restr

items.title: Just Native Furniture
items.description: I moved to Ohau from Wellington in 1996 to establish a business making native timber furniture. I specialise in making traditional style furniture but I am open to other styles. I use mainly recycled timber, predominately Rimu as well as other species such as Matai, Totara, Kauri and Macrocarpa.
